channel.title: RYURYU Game Studio - Latest News
channel.description: Unity outsourcing, Meta Quest VR, Cluster metaverse and XR development by RYURYU Game Studio. 220+ projects delivered, 4.9 average rating. Available in Japanese and English.
channel.copyright: Copyright (c) 2022-2026 RYURYU Game Studio / Ryuya Okamoto

item.title: Meta Horizon Worlds VR Shutting Down June 2026 | Migrate to Cluster with RYURYU
item.description: Meta is ending Horizon Worlds on Meta Quest on June 15 2026 (store removed March 31). RYURYU supports your migration to Cluster for corporate metaverse and virtual events — Unity-based Cluster world creation from JPY 50,000 / 1 week.
item.dc:creator: RYURYU Game Studio

item.title: Meta Quest 3 Price Hike | Lock In Your VR Budget with Fixed-Price Outsourcing
item.description: Meta raised Quest 3 and Quest 3S prices on April 19 2026 (Quest 3S: $299.99 to $349.99) due to RAM shortages. As hardware costs rise RYURYU's fixed-price VR development outsourcing keeps your project budget predictable from day one.
item.dc:creator: RYURYU Game Studio

item.title: Published: Full Guide to Building a Free AIVTuber with Unity and AI
item.description: We published a step-by-step note guide on building a free AIVTuber using VRoid Studio, VOICEVOX, and AITuberKit — all with zero budget required.
item.dc:creator: RYURYU Game Studio

item.title: 220+ VR/AR Project Milestone — 2026 Spring Slots Now Open
item.description: Unity x Meta Quest 3 VR development and Cluster world creation projects have surpassed 220 total deliveries. Spring 2026 project slots are now open.
item.dc:creator: RYURYU Game Studio

item.title: Unofficial But Better Than Official? Why uLoopMCP Is Going Viral
item.description: We published a Zenn article on why the unofficial uLoopMCP tool is gaining massive community attention and its technical background.
item.dc:creator: RYURYU Game Studio

item.title: Unity Goes All-In on AI | How Claude Code x Unity MCP Changes Development
item.description: We published a Zenn article on Unity's official AI integration features and how Claude Code x Unity MCP improves development workflows.
item.dc:creator: RYURYU Game Studio

item.title: AI VTuber (AITuber) Auto-Streaming System Delivered
item.description: We delivered a 24-hour YouTube auto-streaming system utilizing customer character data. The system features AI-powered conversation generation and comment responses built with Unity.
item.dc:creator: RYURYU Game Studio

item.title: Guide Cast Development Service Launched
item.description: We have launched a new commissioned development service for guide casts utilizing AI.
item.dc:creator: RYURYU Game Studio

item.title: Annual Sales of 5.3 Million Yen Achieved
item.description: We achieved annual sales of 5.3 million yen in 2023. We thank everyone for their support.
item.dc:creator: RYURYU Game Studio

item.title: 2 Million Yen Total Sales on Coconala
item.description: Our total sales on Coconala have exceeded 2 million yen. We appreciate our clients trust.
item.dc:creator: RYURYU Game Studio

item.title: Officially Started as Sole Proprietor
item.description: We officially submitted our business registration and started activities as a sole proprietor.
item.dc:creator: RYURYU Game Studio

item.title: Started Coconala Service
item.description: We have started providing services on the crowdsourcing platform Coconala.
item.dc:creator: RYURYU Game Studio
